# Copilot Instructions

This repository is an agent skill repository.

- Keep installable skills under `skills/<skill-name>/`.
- Keep human-facing docs at the repository root or in `examples/`.
- Do not add `README.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`, or install guides inside skill folders.
- Keep `SKILL.md` concise and move long references into `references/`.
- Run `node scripts/validate-skills.mjs` after changing skill metadata.
